name: Spinach Salad (Marge)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Spinach, cleaned, patted dry, torn into pieces
Sliced raw mushrooms (as much as you can afford!)
6 Slices bacon, fried and drained, crumbled
1 Bag radishes, sliced (again, as many as you have)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the torn spinach pieces with the sliced mushrooms.
2. Add the crumbled bacon to the mixture.
3. Fold in the chilled, sliced hardboiled eggs.
4. Slice any additional radishes and add them to the salad.
5. If desired, include the optional red onion slices.
6. Toss all ingredients together until well combined.
7. Serve immediately or cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
